svg.text: song-mode scene list · fixed total size · 7-byte header + 99×6-byte scene slots + 111-byte trailer (song-position state)

g.text: three zones; widths drawn proportional to byte count.
populated first, then zero-filled (num/denom preserved on every slot)
bytes 0..4 zero · byte 5 = numerator · byte 6 = denominator. 3 4 = ¾.
device reads num/denom from bytes 11/12 of the file
(= chunk 0's last 2 bytes), not these header bytes.
we mirror the value here for safety.
one slot per scene · 99 slots total · populated first, then zero-filled. each slot still carries num/denom.
silent groups must point at an empty pattern, not 0.
pat = 0 reads pattern slot 0; an unallocated slot triggers err pattern 189 on load.
see 04_song_pipeline.svg for the silent-pattern allocation pass.
first 16 bytes shown; positions continue at trailer[12..] for as many bytes as song length (max 99).
scenes file size is fixed at 712 bytes. short or oversized files cause the device to error on load.
zero-filling the trailer (treating it as padding) caused err scene 146 — trailer holds song-position state, not just padding.
